name: floaty-server
description: SQLite-backed entity-level REST API for Floaty. Imports the shared domain-core from ../src so server validation IS client validation.

scripts.start:auth-e2e: rm -f .auth-e2e.db .auth-e2e.db-wal .auth-e2e.db-shm && PORT=8887 FLOATY_DB=.auth-e2e.db FLOATY_AUTH=password BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=floaty-auth-e2e-secret-0123456789abcdef BETTER_AUTH_URL=http://localhost:8887 FLOATY_CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:5373,http://127.0.0.1:5373 tsx src/index.ts
